subject: System crashed 3 times
body: The system crashed 3 times today, and orders were lost. Urgent!

subject: Export function error
body: Getting ERROR-4001 when exporting CSV. Can this be fixed? Not urgent.

subject: Thanks for fixing the previous issue
body: The login issue reported last time has been fixed. Thanks to the team!

subject: Need help with permission configuration
body: We have 5 new employees who need tiered permissions configured. Can you provide a guide or remote assistance?
